positive: A stylized minimalist illustration of a mystical, floating island landscape viewed from a slight aerial perspective. The scene features crystalline rock formations, bioluminescent flora in vibrant turquoise and neon magenta, and graceful, soaring origami-like creatures casting strong, defined silhouettes against a deep gradient sunset sky. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometric precision and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic. Use clean vector lines, high contrast, and saturated jewel tones. Composition must be highly symmetrical with the main island cluster centered, designed for perfect apparel placement. Full body view, clean edge, crisp white background bleed for easy printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cluttered, messy, photorealistic, 3d rendering, logos, signatures
